guidance: FY27 revenue guided at Rs1,500-1,700cr (~40-59% growth).
Actively bidding large BESS and solar tenders to extend the book.
BESS emerging as a major new growth vertical alongside core solar EPC.
insights: Won 1,000MWh BESS EPC order from NTPC Renewable Energy, disclosed on the earnings call.
Order book jumped to Rs2,210cr from ~Rs700cr on new tender wins post-results.
FY26 revenue Rs1,067.6cr up 232%; PAT Rs75.2cr up 149%; EBITDA Rs113.6cr up 122%.
Portfolio spans solar EPC, rural electrification/water and now large-scale BESS.
concall.orderExecution: Rs2,210cr book against FY27 guidance of Rs1,500-1,700cr implies roughly 15-18 months of execution visibility.
concall.source: FY26 earnings call 29-May-2026; NSE press release, saurenergy.com, scanx.trade, SolarQuarter
